evidence: AI technologies are quickly evolving and being adopted, which may also increase or intensify potential cybersecurity risks.
Regulatory and legislative developments, as well as executive orders, related to cybersecurity, privacy, data protection and AI could have an adverse impact on our business.
In 2024, European Union lawmakers also signed the Artificial Intelligence Act, which regulates certain use of AI within the European Union.
